app_metadata.description: Qdrant is a vector similarity search engine and vector database. It provides a production-ready service with a convenient API to store, search, and manage vectors with additional payload.
app_metadata.name: qdrant

run_as_context.description: Container [qdrant] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: Qdrant

groups.name: User and Group Configuration
groups.description: Configure User and Group for Qdrant

attrs.label: Image
attrs.description:
Standard - CPU only.</br>
NVIDIA GPU - Includes NVIDIA Vulkan GPU support for accelerated indexing.</br>
AMD GPU - Includes AMD ROCm GPU support for accelerated indexing.

attrs.label: Enable GPU Indexing
attrs.description: Enable GPU-accelerated HNSW index building.

attrs.label: Force Half Precision
attrs.description:
Force half precision (f16) for f32 values during GPU indexing.</br>
Conversion happens only in GPU memory and does not affect storage.

attrs.label: GPU Groups Count
attrs.description:
Number of parallel points indexed by GPU.</br>
Optimal value depends on the GPU model.</br>
Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

attrs.label: GPU Device Filter
attrs.description:
Filter GPU devices by hardware name (case insensitive).</br>
Substrings to match against the device name.
Leave empty to accept all devices.

attrs.label: GPU Parallel Indexes
attrs.description: How many parallel indexing processes are allowed to run on GPU.

attrs.label: Allow Integrated GPUs
attrs.description: Allow use of integrated GPUs.

attrs.label: API Key
attrs.description:
API key for Qdrant. If set, all requests must include
the api-key header. Leave empty to disable authentication.

attrs.label: Read Only API Key
attrs.description:
Read-only API key for Qdrant. If set, requests with this key
will only be able to read data. Leave empty to disable.

attrs.label: Enable CORS
attrs.description:
Enable CORS headers in REST API. If enabled, browsers
are allowed to query REST endpoints regardless of origin.

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that Qdrant files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Group ID
attrs.description: The group id that Qdrant files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Host Network
attrs.description: Bind to the host network. It's recommended to keep this disabled.

attrs.label: HTTP Port
attrs.description: The port for the Qdrant REST API.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: gRPC Port
attrs.description: The port for the Qdrant gRPC API.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Networks
attrs.description: The docker networks to join

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)

attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

1.0.1.readme:
Qdrant

Qdrant is a vector similarity search engine and vector database. It provides a production-ready service with a convenient API to store, search, and manage vectors with additional payload.

chart_metadata.description: Qdrant is a vector similarity search engine and vector database. It provides a production-ready service with a convenient API to store, search, and manage vectors with additional payload.
